summary: Planned and assigned a minimal, safe text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx to validate the PR workflow. Prepared acceptance criteria, definition of done, branch/commit/PR conventions, reviewers, and a short timeline. Handover to Software Engineer to implement.

Documented acceptance criteria and definition of done aligned with PR review workflow and quality gates
Set branch naming, commit message, PR title/description, and reviewer assignments
Established short timeline and dependencies for CI and review
artifacts_updated: No repository artifacts updated in this stage
decision_or_outcome: Proceed with a one-line, text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx to validate end-to-end PR flow
Follow workflows/pull_request_review.md and workflows/release_process.md for approvals and merge
Assign technical_architect for code review and qa_analyst for visual/functional verification

blockers_or_risks: Assumption: src/pages/Index.tsx contains a clearly visible text literal suitable for a safe change
Risk: Accidental formatting or import/style edits; mitigate by changing a single string literal only and staging just that hunk
Dependency: CI pipeline and linting must be operational; if failing for repo reasons unrelated to this change, escalate to PM
Risk: Snapshot tests may fail if they include the changed text; update snapshot only if policy allows and after reviewer approval

implementation_plan.goal: Validate PR workflow with a trivial, non-functional, single-line text change in src/pages/Index.tsx.
implementation_plan.issue_body:
Task: Make a single, visible, non-functional text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx to validate PR flow. Do not alter logic, imports, component structure, styling, classes, or behavior.

Constraints:
- Modify exactly one visible string literal (e.g., append an exclamation point to a main heading or change one word like "Welcome" -> "Welcome!").
- Keep the diff to one line in one file.
- No formatting or lockfile churn; only the single-line change should be staged.

Deliverables:
- New branch with a conventional name.
- Single commit with a clear message.
- Open PR with before/after snippet and a screenshot of the rendered page.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Exactly one text literal changed in src/pages/Index.tsx; no other files modified.
- No import, logic, or styling changes; layout/behavior unchanged.
- CI/lint/build pass.
- PR targets default branch and follows workflows/pull_request_review.md.
- Reviewer can easily verify the change visually and via diff.

Definition of Done:
- Code review completed and approved.
- QA verification completed with screenshot.
- CI/lint/tests green.
recommended_first_changes: Open src/pages/Index.tsx and locate a prominent, top-level visible text literal (e.g., main heading).
Edit only the literal text minimally (e.g., add an exclamation point).
Stage only that single changed line to avoid unrelated formatting diffs.
notes: Suggested commit: chore(index): tweak visible text for PR flow test
PR title: Test PR flow: safe text-only change in Index.tsx
PR description: include before/after snippet and a screenshot of the page rendering the updated text
Request reviewers: technical_architect (code review), qa_analyst (visual verification)

handoff.next_required_action: Implement the one-line text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx, create a new branch, make a single commit, and open a PR per the plan (include before/after snippet and screenshot). Assign technical_architect and qa_analyst as reviewers.
